mapper.insert: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureRoomMapper.insertByPk */ insert into t_lecture_room (room_nm, place, memo, use_yn, reg_id, reg_dt, mod_id, mod_dt) values (#{roomNm},#{place},#{memo},#{useYn},#{regId},#{regDt},#{modId},#{modDt})
mapper.sql:
and use_yn in ('N','Y')
and (room_nm like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%') or place like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%') or memo like concat('%',#{srchWrd},'%'))
